title: geigeria ornativa subsp. rhodesiana
intro: Geigeria ornativa subsp. rhodesiana is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is commonly found in Southern Africa. It has been used traditionally to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Geigeria ornativa subsp. rhodesiana include relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and potential protection against malaria. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and roots, which are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
